scenario.name: Register Then Answer Call
scenario.send: REGISTER sip:[field2]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/UDP [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Max-Forwards: 70 From: <sip:[field0]@[field2]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[field0]@[field2]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 REGISTER Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=udp> Expires: 300 Content-Length: 0

REGISTER sip:[field2]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/UDP [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Max-Forwards: 70 From: <sip:[field0]@[field2]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[field0]@[field2]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 REGISTER Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=udp> Expires: 300 [authentication] Content-Length: 0

SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=udp> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP4 [local_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 101 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-15

BYE sip:[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/UDP [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Max-Forwards: 70 From: [last_To:] To: [last_From:] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 BYE Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port]> Content-Length: 0

REGISTER sip:[field2]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/UDP [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Max-Forwards: 70 From: <sip:[field0]@[field2]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[field0]@[field2]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 3 REGISTER Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=udp> Expires: 0 [authentication] Content-Length: 0
